metadata.description: DCIK — Dorsolateral Contrary Inference Katabasis. 178-perspective multi-model adversarial analysis skill for Claude Code. Produces assessments that exceed any single-AI-prompted output.

plugins.name: dcik
plugins.description: Deep Check: 178 analytical perspectives (Munger, Farnam Street, Heuer & Pherson, Army Red Team, Kahneman, Taleb, Boyd, Snowden, Meadows) in a multi-model adversarial review engine. Install with /plugin marketplace add oxygn-cloud-ai/dcik then /plugin install dcik@dcik-marketplace
